chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No. D-674 of 2024 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For hearing of main case. 29-08-2024. Mr. Abdul Naeem Pirzada, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Zia-ul-Haq Kamboh advocate for respondent No.4. Mr. Ghulam Abbas Kubar, Assistant Advocate General, Sindh. ******** The Statement has been filed along Cheque No. 47671257 worth Rs. 89176/- issued the name of petitioner Mst. Hakim Zadi duly counter signed by Town Officer and Chairman Town Committee Mehrabpur as to the arrears of the petitioner, which is taken on record. Counsel for the respondent No.4 states that remaining arrears of the petitioner will be added/paid in future pension of the petitioner. The petitioner who has filed the instant petition and his counsel are satisfied and seeks disposal of this petition. The instant petition has achieved its purpose and is disposed of accordingly. Judge Judge Nasim/P.A
